content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
This course will look at web applications from the angle of offensive security. The semester's themes will include data collection, vulnerability detection, penetration, and privilege escalation. Understanding the web application architecture, penetration testing a web site, and hardening a vulnerable application will be covered in each section of the course.
Contenu de la matière
Security Fundamentals
Modern Web Applications Structure
Cross Site Scripting Attacks
Cross Site Request Forgery Attacks
SQL Injection Attacks
Denial of Service Attacks
Authentication
Authorization
Secure Development and Deployment
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen Références
• Web Application Security: Exploitation and Countermeasures for Modern Web Applications
